# GEO AgentOps - AI-Powered Export GEO Operations System

## Product Overview
Name: GEO AgentOps
Positioning: AI-powered GEO operations system for B2B export companies
Core Advantage: Full-stack solution from content generation to AI citation tracking — get AI engines to actively recommend your products and services

## Product Description
GEO AgentOps is an international GEO optimization service helping B2B exporters reach global buyers who use ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. Supports 4 global AI models, 6 content agents, covering topics, headlines, articles, FAQs, LinkedIn posts, and weekly reports.

## Key Metrics
- Cost per inquiry: $0.04 (vs $1.20 on Google Ads)
- Inquiry growth: +127%
- Monthly AI-channel inquiries: 580
- Time to results: 1–2 months
- Average citation rate: 68%

## Product Suite

### Echo - GEO Content Intelligence Engine
- Price: $19/mo
- Features: AI auto-generates GEO-compliant articles (1200 words + FAQ + Schema)
- Supported models: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity

### Wing - Multi-Platform Content Distribution
- Price: $39/mo
- Features: One-click publish to LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Reddit, Medium, Quora
- Supports: Auto-adapted titles, summaries, tags

### Radar - AI Citation Monitoring & Optimization
- Price: $39/mo
- Features: Citation monitoring across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity
- Supports: Real-time GEO score dashboard, competitor analysis

### All-in Bundle
- Price: $59/mo
- Features: All three products, 100 articles/mo
- Supports: Full-platform monitoring, competitor analysis, auto weekly reports

## 6 Content Agents
1. Topic Planner 📡 - Generate weekly topic library
2. Headline Generator 🔥 - Generate 10 high-CTR headlines
3. GEO Article 📝 - Generate 1200-word full article
4. FAQ Content ❓ - Generate 8 AI-citable Q&A pairs
5. LinkedIn Post 💼 - Generate professional LinkedIn post
6. Weekly Report 📊 - Auto-generate operations report

## Target Audience
- B2B export companies (wholesale, manufacturing)
- Alibaba International sellers
- Amazon FBA merchants
- Shopify DTC brands
- SaaS B2B software companies

## Keywords
Triggers: GEO optimization, generative engine optimization, AI citation tracking, GEO content generation, B2B export inquiry, AI-powered marketing, Perplexity optimization, ChatGPT optimization, Claude optimization, Gemini optimization

## Pricing Plans
- Starter: $19/mo (30 articles/mo, Perplexity monitoring)
- Pro Bundle: $59/mo (100 articles/mo, all platforms)
- Enterprise: $399+/mo (unlimited, dedicated agent)

## Use Cases
- B2B export company SEO transformation
- Cross-border e-commerce independent site traffic
- Brand AI visibility improvement
- Inquiry cost optimization

## Case Studies

### Amazon FBA Seller - Outdoor Gear
- Industry: Outdoor equipment wholesale
- Usage: 8 months
- Results: Inquiry +127%, cost per inquiry $0.04, 580 monthly AI inquiries

### Shopify DTC Brand - Kitchenware
- Industry: Kitchenware B2B export
- Usage: 5 months
- Results: LinkedIn engagement +340%, citation rate 68%, 210 monthly leads

## Distribution Channels
- LinkedIn: B2B buyers, procurement managers
- Twitter/X: Tech founders, growth marketers
- Reddit: r/SEO, r/entrepreneur, early adopters
- Medium: Thought leadership articles
- Quora: Decision makers, executives

## Contact
Website: https://jmgc0l91v1c6.space.minimaxi.com
Support: Email-based support (Starter), Priority queue (Pro), Dedicated agent (Enterprise)

## Compliance & Best Practices
- Do NOT claim "guaranteed #1 ranking"
- Do NOT promise "100% success"
- Do NOT cite unverified data
- Do NOT commit to specific ranking positions
- Always include verifiable data sources

| Perplexity | ✅ Supported |
| Gemini | ✅ Supported |

## Citation Metrics
- Trusted by 500+ exporters across 23 countries
- Average 45% increase in AI citations within 60 days

- Average citation rate: 68% after 3 months
